# Reliable Indicator Theory of Knowledge

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** b34c1e55-2da4-4b87-9fc7-945d31ddba21
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Does the tracking theory imply skepticism about future predictions?](does-the-tracking-theory-imply-skepticism-about-future-predictions-antithesis-93f89ed3-43f5-4b3b-86cc-8adc421fa804.md)

## Content

**Knowledge requires that one's belief is reliably produced**, **A belief is reliably produced if it is generated by a process that yields a high ratio of true beliefs**, **It is not necessary for a believer to track the truth of each belief in all possible scenarios**
